title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> XP Leaders face the hardest bosses (T
content:
✔ XP Leaders face the hardest bosses (Three Fates, Hydra).
✔ Low-XP students can bypass or face an easier challenge.
✔ If a student fails their challenge, they must complete a final written reflection to recover.

✅ Why This Works:
• Scaffolds difficulty based on player performance.
• Encourages students to uncover hidden shortcuts.
• Prepares students for final analytical & critical thinking tasks in an engaging way.

📜 4. Silent Monks – The Ultimate Self-Denial Challenge

📜 Students who choose the “Ascetic Path” must now remain completely silent.

✔ Instead of class discussions, they must submit written responses.
✔ They must not acknowledge the XP system, bosses, or game mechanics.
✔ They are considered “removed” from the game but will receive final benefits.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 225 (chunk 225/555)
